choices.text: Broken cloud cover (5/8 to 7/8 sky) at 1,300 ft AGL. METAR/TAF altitude in hundreds of feet. FEW <2/8, SCT 3-4/8, BKN 5-7/8, OVC 8/8 = full overcast. Critical for VFR ceiling determination.

File PIREP: "UA /OV [location] /TM [time] /FL [altitude] /TP [aircraft] /TA [temp] /IC MOD RIME" reports moderate rime icing. Helps other pilots. Plus exit icing layer immediately if not certified for ice (most GA isn't).
